---
title: "Compositional data analysis of the Gong & Sharma et al. dataset"
author: "Christian Halter"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(),'%e de %B, %Y')`"
output: 
  rmdformats::downcute:
    lightbox: true
    thumbnails: false
    self_contained: true
    gallery: true
    code_folding: show
  pkgdown:
    as_is: true
---


# Load libraries

```{r, include=FALSE, fig.width=16, fig.height=12}
# renv::init()
# renv::snapshot()

library(pROC)
source("functions.R")

my_seed <- 123
set.seed(my_seed)
```

# Set paths

```{r}
ds_name <- "GongSharma_2024_PrePrintTBD"

path_root <- file.path("~", "Dropbox", "CSI", "Standardized_SingleCell_Datasets", ds_name)
path_data <- file.path(path_root, "data")
path_plots <- file.path("~", "Dropbox", "CSI", "PAPERS", "ECODA", "plots")
```


# Load dataset
Manually downloaded from:
"<https://apps.allenimmunology.org/aifi/insights/dynamics-imm-health-age/downloads/>"

```{r}
files <- list(L1 = file.path(path_data, "sound_life_AIFI_L1_frequencies.csv"),
              L2 = file.path(path_data, "sound_life_AIFI_L2_frequencies.csv"),
              L3 = file.path(path_data, "sound_life_AIFI_L3_frequencies.csv"))

data <- list()

for (f in names(files)) {
  data[[f]] <- read.csv(files[[f]])
}
```



# Process data into wide dataframe

```{r}
dproc <- list()

for (layer in names(data)) {

  dproc$meta <- data[[layer]] %>%
    dplyr::select(c(1:14)) %>%
    unique() %>% 
    mutate_at(1:14, as.factor)
  
  ctable <- data[[layer]] %>%
    dplyr::select(c(14,
             !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer)),
             !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_count")),
             !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_frac_total")),
             !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_clr")))) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer)),
                values_from = c(!!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_count")),
                                !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_frac_total")),
                                !!sym(paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_clr")))) %>% 
    column_to_rownames(var = "specimen.specimenGuid")
  
  i <- 1
  n_cts <- length(unique(data[[layer]][[paste0("AIFI_", layer)]]))
  
  dproc[[layer]]$cell_counts <- ctable[, i:(i + n_cts - 1)] %>%
    mutate_all(~replace_na(., 0)) %>%
    rename_all(~ str_replace_all(., paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_count_"), "") %>%
                 str_replace_all(., " ", "_")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-Platelet, -Erythrocyte)

  i <- i + n_cts
  dproc[[layer]]$freq <- ctable[, i:(i + n_cts - 1)] %>%
    mutate_all(~replace_na(., 0)) %>%
    rename_all(~ str_replace_all(., paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_frac_total_"), "") %>%
                 str_replace_all(., " ", "_")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-Platelet, -Erythrocyte)
  i <- i + n_cts
  dproc[[layer]]$clr_authors <- ctable[, i:(i + n_cts - 1)] %>%
    rename_all(~ str_replace_all(., paste0("AIFI_", layer, "_clr_"), "") %>%
                 str_replace_all(., " ", "_")) %>%
    dplyr::select(-Platelet, -Erythrocyte)
  
  df_counts <- dproc[[layer]]$cell_counts

  df_counts_1count_zero <- df_counts
  df_counts_1count_zero[df_counts_1count_zero == 0] <- 1
  dproc[[layer]]$clr_1count_zero <- df_counts_1count_zero %>% calc_perc_df() %>% clr()
  
  dproc[[layer]]$clr_1count_all <- (df_counts + 1) %>% calc_perc_df() %>% clr()
  
  dproc[[layer]]$clr_0.1perc <- df_counts %>%
    impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>%
    calc_perc_df() %>%
    clr()
}

saveRDS(dproc, file.path(path_data, "cell_type_compositions.rds"))
```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Sensitivity: freq vs clr vs alr vs ilr

CMV negative BR1 female samples are used, as the biggest sources of variation has been removed (subset to specific groups according to major axis of variance).
Subsequently, one or multiple cell types will be artificially increased/decreased to simulate differential abundance.


## L1 anotations


```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L1"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 300, 500)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 2, 3)

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select)
```

### Summarized results

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(trans_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(trans_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = trans_method), size = 1.2) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 0.6)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = trans_method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = trans_method), size = 1.2) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = trans_method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = trans_method), size = 1.2) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = trans_method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```



### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 3
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]



plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels, title = "Counts")
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels, title = "Freq")
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq/100))
plot_pca(data, labels, title = "asinsqrt")
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR")
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR PCA")
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv, title = "ALR mincvref")
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```




## L2 anotations

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L2"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 300, 500)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10)
reps <- 1:20

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select)
```


### Summarized results

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(trans_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(trans_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = trans_method), size = 1.2) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 0.6)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = trans_method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nSilhouette score"))
  p_mod <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = trans_method), size = 1.2) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = trans_method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nModularity score"))
  p_clust <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = trans_method), size = 1.2) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = trans_method)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\nClustering score"))
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```


### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 100
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)


# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]



plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels, title = "Counts")
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

plot_pca(df_freq, labels, title = "Freq")
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq/100))
plot_pca(data, labels, title = "asinsqrt")
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR")
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

res.pca <- prcomp(data)
p <- factoextra::fviz_pca(res.pca,
                          habillage = labels,
                          label = "var",
                          addEllipses = TRUE,
                          pointsize = 3,
                          invisible = c("var", "quali"),
                          geom = "point") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(19, length(unique(labels)))) +
  coord_equal() + NoLegend() + ggtitle("")
ggsave(file.path(path_plots, "workflow_schema_Adjusted_Rand_Index_example.pdf"), width = 3, height = 3)

data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR PCA")
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv, title = "ALR mincvref")
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```



### Mean-variance relationship

```{r}
df_freq_unperturbed <- df_counts %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()
plot(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed), main = "colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed)")
plot(Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed), main = "colVars(df_freq_unperturbed)")
plot(colMeans(df_freq_unperturbed), Rfast::colVars(df_freq_unperturbed))

means <- colMeans(clr(df_freq))
vars <- Rfast::colVars(data.frame(clr(df_freq)))

df1 <- data.frame(mean = means, variance = vars)

ggplot(df1, aes(x = mean, y = variance)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(data = df1, aes(label = row.names(df1)), vjust = -0.5)

```



## L3 annotations

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 300, 500)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select)

```


```{r}
feat_mat <- df_counts %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df() %>% clr()
res.pca <- prcomp(feat_mat, scale. = FALSE)

factoextra::fviz_pca(res.pca,
                          label = "var",
                          invisible = c("var", "quali"),
                          geom = "point") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(19, length(unique(labels)))) + ggtitle("Homogenous population\n(stratified by available metadata)")

ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_1group.pdf")), width = 4, height = 4)
```

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)


# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]


data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = paste0("2 groups of samples by\nadding differential abundance\n", nct, " cell types\n+", pd, " %"),
              pointsize = 1,
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = TRUE) + theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_2groups_weakseparation.pdf")), plot = p, width = 4, height = 4)


nct <- 10
pd <- 300
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)


# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]


data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = paste0("2 groups of samples by\nadding differential abundance\n", nct, " cell types\n+", pd, " %"),
              pointsize = 1,
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = TRUE) + theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_2groups_mediumseparation.pdf")), plot = p, width = 4, height = 4)



nct <- 20
pd <- 300
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)


# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]


data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = paste0("2 groups of samples by\nadding differential abundance\n", nct, " cell types\n+", pd, " %"),
              pointsize = 1,
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = TRUE) + theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_2groups_strongseparation.pdf")), plot = p, width = 4, height = 4)
```

```{r}
nct <- 5
pd <- 500
df_long <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct &
                     results$Percent_difference == pd &
                     results$trans_method %in% c("freq", "arcsine_sqrt_pca", "clr_pca"), ]
df_long$trans_method <- factor(df_long$trans_method, levels = c("freq", "clr_pca", "arcsine_sqrt_pca"))
my_comparisons <- list( c("freq", "clr_pca"), c("freq", "arcsine_sqrt_pca"), c("clr_pca", "arcsine_sqrt_pca") )
ggplot(data = df_long, aes(x = trans_method, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_compare_means(method = "t.test", comparisons = my_comparisons, paired = TRUE, aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\nPercent difference: ", pd))
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_diffct", nct, "_percdiff", pd, ".pdf")), width = 3, height = 4)


nct <- 10
pd <- 300
df_long <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct &
                     results$Percent_difference == pd &
                     results$trans_method %in% c("freq", "arcsine_sqrt_pca", "clr_pca"), ]
df_long$trans_method <- factor(df_long$trans_method, levels = c("freq", "clr_pca", "arcsine_sqrt_pca"))
my_comparisons <- list( c("freq", "clr_pca"), c("freq", "arcsine_sqrt_pca"), c("clr_pca", "arcsine_sqrt_pca") )
ggplot(data = df_long, aes(x = trans_method, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_compare_means(method = "t.test", comparisons = my_comparisons, paired = TRUE, aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\nPercent difference: ", pd))
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_diffct", nct, "_percdiff", pd, ".pdf")), width = 3, height = 4)



nct <- 20
pd <- 200
df_long <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct &
                     results$Percent_difference == pd &
                     results$trans_method %in% c("freq", "arcsine_sqrt_pca", "clr_pca"), ]
df_long$trans_method <- factor(df_long$trans_method, levels = c("freq", "clr_pca", "arcsine_sqrt_pca"))
my_comparisons <- list( c("freq", "clr_pca"), c("freq", "arcsine_sqrt_pca"), c("clr_pca", "arcsine_sqrt_pca") )
ggplot(data = df_long, aes(x = trans_method, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  stat_compare_means(method = "t.test", comparisons = my_comparisons, paired = TRUE, aes(label = after_stat(p.signif))) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle(paste0("Differential cell types: ", nct, "\nPercent difference: ", pd))
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("semisynthetic_example_diffct", nct, "_percdiff", pd, ".pdf")), width = 3, height = 4)
```



```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(trans_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(trans_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  res_avg$linetype <- ifelse(grepl("pca", res_avg$trans_method), "PCA_2dims", "Default")
  res_avg$color <- gsub("_pca", "", res_avg$trans_method)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_mod <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_clust <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("transformations_semisynthetic_default", nct, "celltypesda.pdf")), plot = p_clust, width = 5, height = 5)
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "transformations_semisynthetic_default.pdf"), plot = p_clust + ggtitle("10 random cell types"), width = 5, height = 5)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```


### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 300
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)


# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]

plot_list <- list()

p <- plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels, title = "Counts",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

p <- plot_pca(df_freq, labels, title = "Freq",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq/100))
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "asinsqrt",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR PCA",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "ALR mincvref",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
# plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

p_wrapped <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list, nrow = 2)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("transformations_semisynthetic_default_", nct, "celltypesda_", pd, "percentdifference.pdf")), plot = p_wrapped, width = 4*2, height = 4*2)
```



## L3 annotations unbalanced counts

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# Generate random numbers between -1 and 1 for each row
random_numbers <- runif(nrow(df_counts), min = -1, max = 1)

# Exponentiate 10 with each random number
multiplier <- 10^random_numbers

# Multiply each row by the corresponding multiplier
df_counts <- sweep(df_counts, 1, multiplier, `*`)

df_counts <- round(df_counts)

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 300, 500)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select)

```

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(trans_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(trans_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  res_avg$linetype <- ifelse(grepl("pca", res_avg$trans_method), "PCA_2dims", "Default")
  res_avg$color <- gsub("_pca", "", res_avg$trans_method)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_mod <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_clust <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "transformations_semisynthetic_unbalanced_counts.pdf"),
           plot = p_clust + ggtitle("10 random cell types\nUnbalanced counts:\nEach cell type's counts * 10^[-1, 1]"),
           width = 5, height = 5)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 300
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
# ct_da <- sample(colnames(df_counts_temp), size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]



plot_list <- list()

p <- plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels, title = "Counts",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

p <- plot_pca(df_freq, labels, title = "Freq",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq/100))
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "asinsqrt",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR PCA",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "ALR mincvref",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
# plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

p_wrapped <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list, nrow = 2)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("transformations_semisynthetic_unbalanced_counts_", nct, "celltypesda_", pd, "percentdifference.pdf")), plot = p_wrapped, width = 4*2, height = 4*2)
```



## L3 annotations only low abundant cell types DA

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(200, 300, 500, 1000, 2000, 3000, 5000)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

ct_counts <- colMeans(df_counts)
# Find the threshold for the lowest fourth
threshold <- quantile(ct_counts, 1/4)

# Get the column names with means below the threshold
cts <- colnames(df_counts)[ct_counts < threshold]

n_ct_to_select[n_ct_to_select >= length(cts)] <- length(cts)

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select, cts = cts)

```

```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(trans_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(trans_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  res_avg$linetype <- ifelse(grepl("pca", res_avg$trans_method), "PCA_2dims", "Default")
  res_avg$color <- gsub("_pca", "", res_avg$trans_method)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_mod <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_clust <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "transformations_semisynthetic_lowly_abundant.pdf"), plot = p_clust + ggtitle("10 lowly abundant cell types"), width = 5, height = 5)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 1000
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(cts, size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]



plot_list <- list()

p <- plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels, title = "Counts",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

p <- plot_pca(df_freq, labels, title = "Freq",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq/100))
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "asinsqrt",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR PCA",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "ALR mincvref",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
# plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

p_wrapped <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list, nrow = 2)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("transformations_semisynthetic_lowly_abundant_", nct, "celltypesda_", pd, "percentdifference.pdf")), plot = p_wrapped, width = 4*2, height = 4*2)
```

```{r}
ct_da
data <- clr(df_freq)
library(corrplot)
test <- cor(data)
col<- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(20)
heatmap(x = test, col = col, symm = TRUE)

test <- cor(t(data))
col<- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(20)
heatmap(x = test, col = col, symm = TRUE)
```


```{r}
data <- clr(df_freq)
library(corrplot)
cor_matrix <- cor(data)
col<- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(20)
heatmap(x = test, col = col, symm = TRUE)

# 2. Variance Filtering
variances <- apply(data, 2, var)
plot(variances)
hist(variances, breaks = 20)
threshold <- quantile(variances, 0.8) # Example threshold
filtered_df <- data[, variances > threshold]

plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_pca(filtered_df, labels)



data <- df_counts_temp
library(corrplot)
cor_matrix <- cor(data)
col<- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(20)
heatmap(x = test, col = col, symm = TRUE)

# 2. Variance Filtering
variances <- apply(data, 2, var)
plot(variances)
hist(variances, breaks = 20)
threshold <- quantile(variances, 0.8) # Example threshold
filtered_df <- data[, variances > threshold]

plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_pca(filtered_df, labels)

```




## L3 annotations only highly abundant cell types DA

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")


# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 300, 500)
n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)

ct_counts <- colMeans(df_counts)
# Find the threshold for the highest fourth
threshold <- quantile(ct_counts, 3/4)

# Get the column names with means above the threshold
cts <- colnames(df_counts)[ct_counts >= threshold]

n_ct_to_select[n_ct_to_select >= length(cts)] <- length(cts)

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select, cts = cts)
```



```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(trans_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(trans_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  res_avg$linetype <- ifelse(grepl("pca", res_avg$trans_method), "PCA_2dims", "Default")
  res_avg$color <- gsub("_pca", "", res_avg$trans_method)
  
  p_sil <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_mod <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  p_clust <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = color, linetype = linetype)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct))
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "transformations_semisynthetic_highly_abundant.pdf"), plot = p_clust + ggtitle("10 highly abundant cell types"), width = 5, height = 5)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```

### Show example PCA

```{r}
nct <- 10
pd <- 200
n_half_samples <- round(dim(df_counts)[1] / 2)

# Prepare data
df_counts_temp <- df_counts
ct_da <- sample(cts, size = nct)
half_samples_da <- sample(row.names(df_counts_temp), size = n_half_samples)
labels <- as.numeric(row.names(df_counts) %in% half_samples_da)

# Simulate differential abundance
rsums_before <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] <- round(df_counts_temp[half_samples_da, ct_da] * (1 + pd/100))
rsums_after <- rowSums(df_counts_temp)
df_counts_temp <- round(df_counts_temp / (rsums_after / rsums_before))
df_freq <- df_counts_temp %>% impute_zeros(clr_zero_impute_method = "percentage_all", clr_zero_impute_num = 0.1) %>% calc_perc_df()

cvs <- apply(df_freq, 2, cv)
min_cv <- min(cvs[!colnames(df_freq) %in% ct_da])
ct_ref_mincv <- colnames(df_freq)[which(cvs == min_cv)]



plot_list <- list()

p <- plot_pca(df_counts_temp, labels, title = "Counts",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_counts_temp, labels)

p <- plot_pca(df_freq, labels, title = "Freq",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(df_freq, labels)

data <- asin(sqrt(df_freq/100))
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "asinsqrt",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

data <- clr(df_freq)
p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR",
              sil_score = FALSE,
              mod_score = FALSE,
              cluster_score = FALSE) + theme(legend.position = "none")
plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- prcomp(data)$x[, 1:3]
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "CLR PCA",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

# data <- alr(df_freq, ct_ref_mincv)
# p <- plot_pca(data, labels, title = "ALR mincvref",
#               sil_score = FALSE,
#               mod_score = FALSE,
#               cluster_score = FALSE)
# plot_list <- append(plot_list, list(p))
# plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)

p_wrapped <- patchwork::wrap_plots(plot_list, nrow = 2)
ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("transformations_semisynthetic_highly_abundant_", nct, "celltypesda_", pd, "percentdifference.pdf")), plot = p_wrapped, width = 4*2, height = 4*2)
```

```{r}
cohens_d <- function(x, group) {
  mean_a <- mean(x[group == levels(group)[1]])
  mean_b <- mean(x[group == levels(group)[2]])
  sd_a <- sd(x[group == levels(group)[1]])
  sd_b <- sd(x[group == levels(group)[2]])
  pooled_sd <- sqrt((sd_a^2 + sd_b^2) / 2)
  (mean_b - mean_a) / pooled_sd
}


data <- df_freq[, ct_da[1]]
hist(data)
data <- data.frame(values = data,
                   groups = factor(labels))
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = values, fill = groups)) +
  geom_density(alpha=0.4) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), alpha=0.3, colour="black", 
                 position="identity") +
  labs(title = "Density Plot of PC1 Scores",
       x = "PC1 Scores",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_classic()
print(p)

d_value <- cohens_d(data$values, data$groups)
print(paste("Cohen's d:", d_value))

wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(values ~ groups, data = data)
print(paste("Wilcoxon p-value:", wilcox_result$p.value))


data <- clr(df_freq)[, ct_da[1]]
hist(data)
data <- data.frame(values = data,
                   groups = factor(labels))
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = values, fill = groups)) +
  geom_density(alpha=0.4) + 
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), alpha=0.3, colour="black", 
                 position="identity") +
  labs(title = "Density Plot of PC1 Scores",
       x = "PC1 Scores",
       y = "Density") +
  theme_classic()
print(p)

d_value <- cohens_d(data$values, data$groups)
print(paste("Cohen's d:", d_value))

wilcox_result <- wilcox.test(values ~ groups, data = data)
print(paste("Wilcoxon p-value:", wilcox_result$p.value))
```



```{r}
data <- clr(df_freq)
plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_pca(data, labels, scale. = TRUE)

plot_roc_pcad1(data, labels)
```


```{r}
ct_da

data <- clr(df_freq)
library(corrplot)
cor_matrix <- cor(data)
col<- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(20)
heatmap(x = cor_matrix, col = col)
hist(data[, ct_da[1]])
diptest::dip.test(data[, ct_da[1]])

# 2. Variance Filtering
variances <- apply(data, 2, var)
plot(variances)
hist(variances, breaks = 20)
threshold <- quantile(variances, 0.8) # Example threshold
filtered_df <- data[, variances > threshold]

plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_pca(filtered_df, labels)

plot_pca(data[,ct_da], labels)



data <- df_counts_temp
library(corrplot)
cor_matrix <- cor(data)
col<- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(20)
heatmap(x = cor_matrix, col = col)
hist(data[, ct_da[1]])
diptest::dip.test(data[, ct_da[1]])


# 2. Variance Filtering
variances <- apply(data, 2, var)
plot(variances)
hist(variances, breaks = 20)
threshold <- quantile(variances, 0.8) # Example threshold
filtered_df <- data[, variances > threshold]

plot_pca(data, labels)
plot_pca(filtered_df, labels)


plot_pca(data[,ct_da], labels)

```



# ---------------------------------------------------------------

# Sensitivity: zero imputation methods

```{r}
# Subset to CMV negative BR1 female samples
cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples <- (dproc$meta$subject.cmv == "Negative") & (dproc$meta$cohort.cohortGuid == "BR1") & (dproc$meta$subject.biologicalSex == "Female")

df_counts <- dproc[["L3"]]$cell_counts[cmv_neg_BR1_female_samples,]

colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\-", "minus")
colnames(df_counts) <- stringr::str_replace_all(colnames(df_counts), "\\+", "plus")

# To one or multiple cell types, add +1%, +5%, +10%, +20%, +50%
Percent_difference <- c(10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 200, 300, 500, 1000)
# n_ct_to_select <- c(1, 3, 5, 10, 20)
n_ct_to_select <- 10

results <- datrans(count_mat = df_counts, labels = NULL, Percent_difference = Percent_difference, n_ct_to_select = n_ct_to_select,
                   trans_method = "clr",
                   zero_imp_method = c(
                      "counts_zeros__1",
                      "counts_all__1",
                      "percentage_all__0.001",
                      "percentage_all__0.01",
                      "percentage_all__0.1",
                      "percentage_all__1",
                      # "arcsine_sqrt",
                      # "impRZilr",
                      "multLN",
                      "multRepl__0.01",
                      "multRepl__0.1",
                      "multRepl__1"
                   )
)

```


```{r fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
for (nct in n_ct_to_select) {
  res_all <- results[results$n_celltypes == nct, ]
  res_avg <- res_all %>%
    group_by(zero_imp_method, Percent_difference) %>%
    mutate(sil_sem = sd(Silhouette_score) / sqrt(length(Silhouette_score)), Silhouette_score = mean(Silhouette_score),
           mod_sem = sd(Modularity_score) / sqrt(length(Modularity_score)), Modularity_score = mean(Modularity_score),
           ari_sem = sd(Adjusted_Rand_Index) / sqrt(length(Adjusted_Rand_Index)), Adjusted_Rand_Index = mean(Adjusted_Rand_Index)) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    distinct(interaction(zero_imp_method, Percent_difference), .keep_all=TRUE)
  
  zim <- res_avg$zero_imp_method
  zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)] <- paste0(zim[grepl("multRepl|percentage", zim)], "%")
  res_avg$zero_imp_method <- zim
  
  p_sil <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Silhouette_score-sil_sem, ymax=Silhouette_score+sil_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Silhouette_score), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Silhouette_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_mod <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Modularity_score-mod_sem, ymax=Modularity_score+mod_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Modularity_score), 0.5)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  p_clust <- ggplot(res_avg, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Adjusted_Rand_Index, color = zero_imp_method)) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Adjusted_Rand_Index-ari_sem, ymax=Adjusted_Rand_Index+ari_sem)) +
    ylim(c(min(res_avg$Adjusted_Rand_Index), 1)) +
    theme_classic() +
    # geom_point(data = res_all, aes(x = Percent_difference, y = Modularity_score)) +
    ggtitle(paste0("Differentially abundant cell types: ", nct, "\n(CLR-transformation)"))
  
  ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, paste0("zero_imputation_semisynthetic_default", nct, "celltypesda.pdf")), plot = p_clust, width = 4, height = 4)
  
  if (nct == 10) {
    ggsave(filename = file.path(path_plots, "zero_imputation_semisynthetic_default.pdf"), plot = p_clust, width = 6, height = 5)
  }
  
  p <- ggarrange(p_sil, p_mod, p_clust)
  print(p)
}

```
